CONTENT.Club career: Ito was nominated for Bundesliga's rookie of the year award 2018.On 22 August 2019, he joined Belgian club Sint-Truiden.On 21 January 2022, Ito was loaned to 1. FC Magdeburg in 3. Liga.On 21 June 2023, Ito moved to 1. FC Magdeburg on a permanent contract.
CONTENT.External links: Tatsuya Ito at SoccerwayTatsuya Ito at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: On 30 August 2018, Ito received his first international call-up to the Japan national team for the Kirin Challenge Cup 2018.On 24 May 2019, Ito was called up by Japan's head coach Hajime Moriyasu to feature in the Copa América, held in Brazil.

SUMMARY: Tatsuya Ito (Japanese: 伊藤達哉; born 26 June 1997) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a forward for German club 1. FC Magdeburg.
